name: ecp
description: E-commerce conversion-psychology audit engine (Claude Code plugin). Node tooling for the editable hotspot tool and report-render smoke tests; the audit itself is the /ecp:audit plugin command. Canonical scope: product.md.

scripts.check:python: python -m py_compile scripts/report/templates/js.py scripts/report/templates/html_structure.py scripts/report/templates/components.py scripts/report/templates/css.py scripts/report/html_builder.py scripts/report/v2_html_builder.py
scripts.test: npm run check:editor && npm run check:python && npm run smoke:editor

author: Daniel Kinsner
